theme_notes: Today's touchstones: Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff flying to Pakistan for direct Iran talks (day 56 of the Iran war, ceasefire extension running out), the $81B Warner Bros.–Paramount merger approved by shareholders, the NBA Playoffs opening with the Celtics' record 32-point blowout of the 76ers, the Michael Jackson biopic 'Michael' (starring Jaafar Jackson) releasing today, the EU's $106B Ukraine loan clearing after months of deadlock, and Meta layoffs headlining the news cycle.
settled: Like the Iran ceasefire: technically in effect, but Kushner's still packing his bags.
Zero. Warner just paid $81 billion for bigger problems. Enjoy the stillness.
All even. The EU took four months to approve something this simple. You took a day.
youOwe: Jared Kushner flew to Pakistan for this. Yours requires a Venmo tap. Somehow harder.
Celtics opened by 32. Your deficit is less dramatic and somehow more embarrassing.
Meta laid off people this week. You owe less than their coffee budget. Still owed.
The EU approved $106 billion for Ukraine. Still waiting on your $150.
MJ biopic opened today. Jaafar gave everything. You owe this. That's the whole joke.
Pre-ceasefire-collapse energy. Polite. Tense. Running out of time.
The Hormuz is technically open. Your partner's goodwill is technically not.
Warner-Paramount is worth $81B. You own this debt. Notice the gap.
Celtics beat Philly by 32 in game one. Your partner is not playing games.
Trump gave Iran a short window before the ceasefire ends. You also have a window.
Warner shareholders voted in one afternoon. Your tab has been in committee for months.
Jaafar Jackson trained years to play Michael Jackson. You've had months to just pay.
Meta laid off thousands over performance. Your record here is under review.
Jared Kushner is in Pakistan. Steve Witkoff too. Even your excuses have a better itinerary.
The IMF cut global growth by half a point. Your forecast here is grimmer.
Warner paid $81B and still had better financials than this relationship right now.
Iran got a ceasefire extension. You will not.
The global economy is in the shadow of war. This household is in the shadow of you.
theyOwe: Ceasefire status: both sides agreed, nothing transferred, everyone pretending.
Less than Celtics opening-night popcorn. Still owed.
Meta cut thousands this week and still moved faster than this.
The EU's $106B cleared in months. Your share has been pending since before the playoffs.
The MJ biopic dropped today. Jaafar showed up for his role. They haven't shown up for theirs.
Jared Kushner flies internationally for smaller asks. They can open an app.
Oil spiked when the Hormuz closed. Your patience spiked at the same time.
Warner-Paramount merged their whole universe. Your partner merged your money into their life.
NBA playoffs round one. You haven't scored yet. That changes now.
Bigger than a ceasefire breach and equally hard to get anyone to acknowledge.
The EU sat on Ukraine's money for months, then moved. Schedule the conversation.
Celtics made a 32-point statement in game one. Make yours.
Meta eliminated thousands without ceremony. Adopt that frequency.
The IMF flagged this as 'material risk.' Your partner agrees.
Jaafar moonwalked into theaters today as the King of Pop. Moonwalk into their inbox.
The $81B Warner-Paramount deal closed by shareholder vote Thursday. Yours still hasn't.
Iran has a ceasefire, a mediator, and a deadline. You have none of those. Fix two of them.
Jared Kushner flew to Pakistan. Make them at least cross the room.
